title: BTFLY v0.2 — username setup, notifications & reflys
body: New in this release: first-time users are now prompted to choose a username. Added notifications (likes, replies, follows, mentions, reflys), bookmarks, refly/unrefly, post editing, content warnings, search, trending feed, and a news tab (you're looking at it). The backend has been significantly expanded — see the GitHub for the full changelog.

title: API documentation is now live
body: Swagger UI is available on any running node at /swagger. The full endpoint reference covers auth, posts, accounts, notifications, search, nodes and moderation.

title: First public Light node accepting registrations
body: btfly-node-testing.up.railway.app is open for signups. Light nodes replicate posts from across the network so you see a broader feed from day one.
